title: erigeron domesticus
intro: Erigeron domesticus, also known as the Common Fleabane, is a perennial plant native to North America and parts of Europe, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and ease digestive issues. The health benefits of Erigeron domesticus include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Erigeron domesticus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal remedies and treatments.
